name: ruby-thread-safe
title: ruby-thread-safe
summary: thread-safe collections and utilities for Ruby
description:
thread-safe collections and utilities for Ruby
This Ruby library contains a collection of data structures providing
thread-safe versions of arrays and hashes. These data structures lock
against the objects themselves for every method call, ensuring only one thread
can be reading or writing at a time.
.
These data structures as well as the utilities contained in this library make
thread-safe programming in Ruby easier.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-thread-safe because thread-safe collections and utilities for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-thread-safe as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-thread-safe with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-thread-safe --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
